ddls:
CREATE TABLE "car_data" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the car data is stored */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "displ" REAL /* Engine displacement in liters */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the car model */,
  "cyl" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "trans" TEXT /* Transmission type (e.g., auto(l4), manual(m5)) */,
  "drv" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., f for front-wheel drive, r for rear-wheel drive) */,
  "cty" INTEGER /* City fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "hwy" INTEGER /* Highway fuel efficiency in miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "fl" TEXT /* Fuel type (e.g., r for regular, p for premium) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the car (e.g., midsize, compact) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Engine horsepower */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Engine torque */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the car data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the car data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_data_fl FOREIGN KEY ("fl") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_data_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_data_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES car_classes ("class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_data_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_data_trans FOREIGN KEY ("trans") REFERENCES transmissions ("trans_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the manufacturer */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the car model */,
  "first_production_year" INTEGER /* First year the model was produced */,
  "last_production_year" INTEGER /* Last year the model was produced */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the car model image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "trans_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "trans_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type (e.g., auto(l4), manual(m5)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  "trans_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual, semi-automatic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trans_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., r for regular, p for premium) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "fuel_octane" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the car class (e.g., midsize, compact) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of car class (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., inline, V-type, boxer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
